name: one-page-marketing
description: Build a complete marketing plan covering the full customer journey from stranger to raving fan. Use when the user mentions "marketing plan", "target market", "USP", "lead nurture", "customer lifetime value", "referral program", "marketing strategy", or "PVP Index". Also trigger when building a marketing plan from scratch, choosing acquisition channels, or designing end-to-end customer lifecycle campaigns. Covers the PVP Index, channel selection, and advocacy systems. For brand messaging, see sto
author: wondelai
summary_zh: 这是一个帮你梳理从吸引陌生人到培养铁粉的完整营销策划工具，适合从零搭建营销体系、挑选获客渠道或设计客户全生命周期活动时使用。
